data.body:
DONE — implemented per the approved+code-validated plan v3, in two passes, both opus-reviewed + independently verified.
PASS 1 (e44e36c2): bounded every acli call via the _run_acli chokepoint — Popen(start_new_session POSIX, stdin=DEVNULL, text=True, errors='replace') + communicate(timeout=REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT default 120, <=0 falls back) + process-group reap (getpgid ESRCH/EPERM-guarded -> killpg SIGTERM -> 3s grace -> SIGKILL -> 2s bounded drain, D-state safe). Terminal AcliTimeoutError (NOT a builtin TimeoutError) raised before _check_mutation_failure. retry_on_timeout flag: 5 reads retry, 9 writes terminal (a non-idempotent write timeout is never blind-retried; AcliTimeoutError isn't caught by _call_with_retry so no compounding). Delete bypass routed through the chokepoint. 10 unit tests incl. a real grandchild-holding-pipe process-group reap + read/write classification guard; mutation-tested (subclass-TimeoutError and orphan-group both caught).
PASS 2 (93219076): link write-safety — live pre-create get_issue_links existence check (cached once/update, direction-agnostic, non-fatal) closes the cross-pass/agent + timeout duplicate windows; intra-_run_acli CalledProcessError-retry window documented as narrow pre-existing residual. Rolled-in SDET link tests (C1 deterministic dedup, C2 duplicate-prevention call_count, I1 inbound real-store observability + invalid-relation rejection, roundtrip 6th case, docstring fix, to_key tighten).
VALIDATION: 5 falsifiable spikes (E1-E5) pre-implementation; prior-art comparison (converges with billiard/celery/urllib3/tenacity); opus plan-review APPROVE after C1/I2/I1 revisions; per-pass opus implementation reviews APPROVE-WITH-NITS (nits applied). Suite green (broad 1792 + integration 18); ruff clean. Deferred: network-git timeouts (c16f).
